name: product-polish-refactor
title: Product polish and refactor
description: Optimize and refactor the Exa reverse proxy, improve core quality, Admin UI/UX, documentation, and GitHub readiness under full product ownership.
creator: apaidedie
notes: 2026-07-08: Completed a major product-polish batch: dependency audit fix, Admin Console UI/UX refinement, docs/screenshot refresh, CI/release/docker workflow hardening, project hygiene regression tests, and code-spec updates. Verification passed: npm run verify, npm run test:e2e, docker compose config --no-interpolate. Local docker build command was corrected to real docker build, but local image build could not run because Docker Desktop daemon was not connected. Continued with an unauthenticated /_proxy/ready readiness probe, Dockerfile HEALTHCHECK now uses readiness while /_proxy/live remains liveness. Added regression coverage for no-key, healthy-key, and all-disabled readiness states. Verification passed again: npm run verify (103 tests), npm run test:e2e, docker compose config --no-interpolate. Docker build remains blocked by disconnected Docker Desktop daemon. Added docs/openapi.json for /_proxy probes and management routes, linked it from docs, and added project-hygiene drift checks so route changes must update the API contract. Added npm run setup:env to generate a source-deployment .env with strong random required secrets, documented it, and covered overwrite safety with tests. Hardened scan:secrets so it scans both tracked and untracked non-ignored files, which keeps verification meaningful before the repository has an initial commit. Latest verification after setup-env and scan hardening: npx vitest run test/setup-env.test.ts test/project-hygiene.test.ts passed (10 tests); npm run verify passed (18 files, 106 tests, audit 0 vulnerabilities, build passed); npm run test:e2e passed; docker compose config --no-interpolate passed; docker build remains blocked by missing Docker Desktop Linux engine pipe. Added master to CI push branches because the current repo branch is master while docs and release targets also refer to main; project hygiene now asserts both main and master pushes run the full gate.
